TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Tony_Tan, title = Tony_Tan, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Tony_Tan} }

S.FORM: Tony Tan ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 2, Tony Tan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Singapore ta' misuw hya' ga Tony Tan, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'

Tony Tan ryax sa tay 7 nqu tay 2, Tony Tan, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1940) mrhuw Singapore ta' misuw hya' ga Tony Tan, aring ryax tay 1 squ byacing tay 9 sa kawas 2011 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: tonj tan rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tonj tan, s~ɕquliq na s~ɕeziʔ. (minħtuw s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj ****) mrħuw s~ɕiŋapore taʔ mis~ɕuw ħjaʔ ɣa tonj tan, ariŋ rjax taj * s~ɕqu βjaʦ~ʨiŋ taj * s~ɕa kawas~ɕ **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ s~ɕpazjaŋ βalaj ms~ɕʔrux kja la. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ
